name: Can I sue my employer for work illness instead of comp in Boise?
description: No, comp is exclusive unless intentional.[2]

mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for work illness instead of comp in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp is exclusive unless intentional.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Generally no; workers' comp is exclusive remedy unless intentional tort.[2] Idaho bars suits for negligence-covered illnesses.[2] Key factors: (1) gross negligence rare exception; (2) third-party suits possible. Stick to comp channel. Consult on exceptions. Limits but ensures benefits.
